sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data found in available sources

special_mechanics.name: Equipment System
special_mechanics.description: Game features various items and equipment that can be used to access other areas and progress through islands

special_mechanics.name: World Map Navigation
special_mechanics.description: Player travels by raft on the sea between different islands on a world map

special_mechanics.name: Random Encounters
special_mechanics.description: Enemy encounters trigger side-scrolling battles where player must defeat enemies or flee

tier_notes: Tier 3 (empirical/qualitative) - No precise physics parameters documented. Sources contain game design and content information but lack specific movement, gravity, or jump mechanics data. This is a platformer with action-adventure/Metroidvania elements emphasizing exploration and non-linear level design rather than precise movement mechanics.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Super Adventure Island II
